ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Name of the strain of cannabis */,
  "grams" TEXT /* Weight or quantity of the product */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Flower, Preroll) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., sativa, indica, hybrid) */,
  "thc_level" TEXT /* THC level of the product */,
  "cbd_level" TEXT /* CBD level of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory records */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the products table */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "low_inventory_alert" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the product is running low */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time when the stock level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Customer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Customer's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment for the order (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that includes this item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "subtotal" TEXT /* Subtotal for the order item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
